product_overview: SkillBridge is an AI-powered web app that generates structured learning roadmaps, surfaces node-level resources/quizzes/notes, and tracks progress with XP, streaks, and badges. Users create and manage projects in an interactive flow canvas, chat with an AI tutor, and share or export roadmaps.
core_goals: Enable users to generate practical, step-by-step learning roadmaps from natural language goals
Provide an interactive visual workspace (canvas + node detail) to study, take quizzes, save notes, and ask an AI tutor
Track user progress and gamify learning with XP, levels, streaks, and badges
Persist projects and roadmaps, support public sharing and exports

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allow new users to create an account with email/password and require email verification before full access.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Register button to submit -> See success message -> Click verification link in email -> Navigate to /verify-email/:token -> See confirmation that email is verified -> Redirect to /app

Navigate to /register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field with existing email -> Fill password input field -> Click Register button to submit -> See error message indicating email already in use

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate existing users with email/password or via OAuth and redirect authenticated users to the app canvas.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See success and redirect to /app
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill incorrect password in password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message indicating invalid credentials

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Request a password reset email and use a tokenized reset link to set a new password.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill email input field -> Click submit button -> See confirmation message instructing to check email -> Click reset link in email -> Navigate to /reset-password/:token -> Fill new password field -> Click submit -> See success confirmation

Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill email input field with unknown email -> Click submit button -> See informational message that reset email was sent (no account enumeration) or see error message if rate-limited

features.name: AI Roadmap Generation
features.description: Generate a tailored learning roadmap via AI using a natural language goal and user preferences, then render it on the canvas and persist the project/roadmap.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Type a learning goal in the prompt input -> Select skill level preference (beginner/intermediate/advanced) -> Select learning time preference (casual/moderate/intensive) -> Select learning style preference (theory/practice/balanced) -> Select goal type (career/project/certification/hobby) -> Click Generate button -> Wait for AI-generated roadmap to render on canvas -> See new project/roadmap saved in sidebar
Navigate to /app -> Type a learning goal in the prompt input -> Click Generate button -> API returns error or rate-limit -> See error message/toast and option to retry

features.name: Roadmap Canvas Interaction
features.description: Browse and manipulate the roadmap in a React Flow canvas including navigation aids and progress indicators.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> View rendered roadmap on canvas -> Pan and zoom the canvas -> Use minimap for navigation -> Click on a node to open node detail panel -> See global progress indicator update when nodes completed
Navigate to /app -> Attempt to load a large roadmap -> Canvas fails to render due to network or parsing error -> See error message and option to retry or open a lightweight view

features.name: Node Detail Panel
features.description: Open a node detail panel to access Resources, AI Tutor, Notes, and Quiz for the selected topic and mark the node complete.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Click on a node on canvas to open detail panel -> Switch to Resources tab -> View resources for the selected topic -> Open a resource link -> Switch to Notes tab -> Type notes in the editor -> Notes auto-save -> Switch to Quiz tab -> Click Take Quiz button

Navigate to /app -> Click on a node on canvas to open detail panel -> Switch to Notes tab -> System fails to fetch notes via GET /api/notes/:roadmapId/:nodeId/:userId -> See error message in node panel and retry option

features.name: Quiz System
features.description: Generate and deliver timed multiple-choice quizzes per topic, grade them, cache results, and award XP on passing.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Click on a node on canvas to open detail panel -> Switch to Quiz tab -> Click Take Quiz button in node detail panel -> Answer multiple choice questions -> Submit quiz before timer ends -> View results with score and pass/fail status -> Receive XP on passing

Navigate to /app -> Click on a node on canvas to open detail panel -> Switch to Quiz tab -> Click Take Quiz button -> Timer expires before submitting answers -> See timeout message and partial results or prompt to retake quiz

features.name: AI Tutor Chat
features.description: Chat with an AI tutor scoped to a specific node or project, with persisted chat history and response controls.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Click on a node on canvas to open detail panel -> Open AI Tutor tab in node detail -> Type a question about the topic -> Send message -> Receive AI response -> View chat history
Navigate to /app -> Open AI Tutor tab in node detail -> Type a question -> Send message -> AI provider returns error or times out -> See fallback message and option to regenerate or mark feedback

features.name: Notes
features.description: Create and persist notes per node with auto-save and manual save semantics.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Click on a node on canvas to open detail panel -> Open Notes tab in node detail -> Type notes in the editor -> Notes auto-save in background -> See saved indicator
Navigate to /app -> Open Notes tab in node detail -> Type notes in the editor -> Network error occurs on auto-save PUT /api/notes/:roadmapId/:nodeId/:userId -> See save error toast and retry option

features.name: User Profile
features.description: Display and edit user profile with learning stats, achievements, and a list of projects and progress.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> View profile stats (XP, level, streak, learning time) -> View project list with progress -> Click Edit profile -> Edit name and bio fields -> Save changes -> See success confirmation

Navigate to /profile -> Click Edit profile -> Change profile fields -> Click Save -> Server returns validation error or network error on PUT /api/profile/:userId -> See error message and preserved draft

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Create, open, rename, and delete learning projects persisted to the backend.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> View list of projects in sidebar -> Click to open a project -> Click New Project button -> Enter project name -> Click Create -> See new project appear in sidebar and open in canvas
Navigate to /app -> View list of projects in sidebar -> Click delete on a project -> Confirm deletion -> API returns error deleting project -> See error message and project remains in list

features.name: Share Roadmap
features.description: Toggle roadmap public visibility and generate a shareable public URL for read-only viewing.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Open project settings for current roadmap -> Toggle roadmap public visibility -> Click Copy share link -> Paste copied link -> Navigate to /share/:roadmapId as a visitor -> View shared roadmap in read-only mode
Navigate to /app -> Open project settings -> Toggle roadmap public visibility -> API patch fails -> See error toast and visibility toggle reverts

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public marketing landing page with hero, feature highlights, pricing, and CTAs that route visitors to registration.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View hero section with CTA -> Browse feature highlights -> Click Get Started -> Navigate to /register
Navigate to / while already authenticated -> Landing page detects auth -> Redirect to /app

routes.description: Landing page, redirects to /app if authenticated
User login page with email and password
Main app canvas with roadmap editor and AI generation
User profile page with stats, projects, and achievements
